docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YANGA, CHRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT CONRAD, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
